gotchas.name: pycache-silences-edits
gotchas.pattern: Source changes have no effect after gateway restart

gotchas.name: venice-glm-heretic-thinking
gotchas.pattern: GLM heretic returns empty content, all output in reasoning_content
gotchas.fix: Use deepseek-v4-pro for EXPRESS, not GLM variant
gotchas.detection: Check content field empty + reasoning_content populated

gotchas.name: plugin-loads-from-profile-dir
gotchas.pattern: Plugin not found after copying to global plugins/
gotchas.fix: Plugin lives in profiles/<name>/plugins/hermes-evol/, not global

gotchas.name: gateway-contention-kills-memorize
gotchas.pattern: MEMORIZE returns 0 items after successful REFLECT
gotchas.fix: Built-in 30s cooldown retry in memorize(), 3rd fallback to Venice

gotchas.name: old-evol-entries-string-format
gotchas.pattern: evol.jsonl entries pre-v0.4.0 use string for 'express' field
gotchas.fix: _load_previous_cycle() handles both dict and string formats
